name: siftkit
description: Windows-first shell-output compression toolkit for Codex workflows.

scripts.build: npm --prefix .\packages\contracts run build && tsc -p .\tsconfig.json && tsc -p .\tsconfig.scripts.json && npm --prefix .\dashboard run build && node .\scripts\sync-dist-runtime.js
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b .\packages\contracts\tsconfig.json && tsc -p .\tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p .\tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit && tsc -p .\dashboard\tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck:bench && npm run typecheck:test && npm run typecheck:dashboard-test && npm run typecheck:analysis && npm run lint
scripts.test: npm run typecheck:test && npm run build:test && node .\dist\scripts\run-tests.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:test && npx c8 --include="src/**/*.ts" --exclude="node_modules/**" --exclude="tests/**" --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary node .\dist\scripts\run-tests.js
scripts.test:coverage:llm: npm run build:test && npx c8 --include="src/llm-protocol/**/*.ts" --include="src/agent-loop/**/*.ts" --exclude="node_modules/**" --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary node .\dist\scripts\run-tests.js
scripts.test:live: npm run build && powershell -Command "$env:SIFTKIT_TEST_USE_EXISTING_SERVER='1'; if (-not $env:SIFTKIT_STATUS_BACKEND_URL) { $env:SIFTKIT_STATUS_BACKEND_URL='http://127.0.0.1:4765/status' }; if (-not $env:SIFTKIT_CONFIG_SERVICE_URL) { $env:SIFTKIT_CONFIG_SERVICE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:4765/config' }; npx tsx --test --test-name-pattern 'concurrent oversized CLI summary requests' .\tests\runtime-cli.test.ts"
